summary: Planning is complete for GitHub issue #4. Execute a docs/spec-only contract for Kontour producer emitters, sink roles, control-plane and telemetry-plane records, fanout, local-first fallback, delivery results, dedupe, and inert action descriptors.
next_steps: Use .agents/flow-agents/define-emitter-sink-plane-contract/define-emitter-sink-plane-contract--plan-work-plan.md as the source of truth for execution.
Create docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md as the primary durable spec.
Add only narrow discoverability links from docs/specs/projection-schema.md, docs/product-boundaries.md, or README.md if needed.
Verify R1-R6 and AC1-AC5 by doc inspection, targeted rg checks, security-sensitive wording review, and diff scope review.
warnings: Keep scope docs/spec only; do not add hosted API, HTTP/OTLP/network sink, emitter code, product integration, or UI.
Preserve local file output as a required first-class sink while treating HTTP/API and telemetry/Otel sinks as future roles.
Be precise that generic sinks never execute action descriptors, open URLs, call endpoints, run commands, fetch backend resources, or mutate product-owned state.
Align local path language with existing sanitized identifier, containment, and symlink escape rules in docs/specs/projection-schema.md.
